data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Deposit hold/capture integration', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this integration within the prior steps. The lack of any related API calls or state checks regarding deposit holds indicates a significant gap in the coverage of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of deposit hold/capture integration functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for deposit hold integration
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the deposit hold/capture integration.
